scripts.build: node --import=tsx ./scripts/require-cli-toolchain.ts build && rimraf dist && tsc -b tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir ../core build && pnpm --dir ../importers build && pnpm --dir ../query build && node --import=tsx ./scripts/require-cli-toolchain.ts typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json --pretty false
scripts.test: pnpm --dir ../contracts build && pnpm --dir ../core build && pnpm --dir ../importers build && pnpm --dir ../query build && pnpm build && node --import=tsx ./scripts/verify-package-shape.ts && node --import=tsx --test ./test/*.test.ts
